From outside it doesn't look big but I ended spending more than an hour on the ground floor only. Great history from the 19th century wow! A great tour with a great guide learnt more about the Chinese laborers and the gold rush

It is a small museum, but very entertaining. You can learn about the history of the streetcar in San Francisco and there is a reproduction of the cab of one, with original machinery, where you can learn how they were run, as well as experience the coin payment system through a small collecting machine.
It's free, but they're maintained thanks to the sale of souvenirs, so we tell you some nice things.
They were very kind to explain everything we wanted to know.
